# Commit Message Template
# Format: <type>: <short description>
#
# Types: feat | fix | docs | style | refactor | test | ci | chore
#
# Examples:
#   feat: add milestone approval UI
#   fix: correct ABI format for viem compatibility
#   docs: update README with contract addresses
#   ci: add Vercel deploy step to workflow
#   test: add MedicalFund donation edge cases
